# Priyansh Singh Purawat — Full Stack Developer (MERN)

> Full Stack Developer based in Jaipur, India. Building scalable web applications with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Open to remote and relocation.

Priyansh ships end-to-end MERN applications — REST APIs, JWT auth, role-based access control, MongoDB schema design, Redis caching, Razorpay payments, deployment on Vercel and Render.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Hero, featured case study (MensVibe), skills, about, work experience, other work, contact.
- [MensVibe case study](/projects/ecommerce-mern): Production MERN e-commerce platform, multi-role dashboards.

## Skills

### Frontend Engineering
React, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Framer Motion, Vite

### Backend Engineering
Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, MySQL, REST APIs, JWT, Role-Based Access Control, Cloudinary, Git, GitHub, Postman, Vercel, Render

## Featured project
- MensVibe — Production MERN e-commerce platform. React 19, Node, Express, MongoDB, Redis cache, Socket.io real-time, Razorpay payments, Cloudinary uploads, JWT + Google OAuth, Zod validation, Admin/Seller/Buyer roles. https://github.com/priyanshsinghpurawat

## Other work
- Aspect Ratio Calculator — vanilla JS utility, <10KB. https://github.com/priyanshsinghpurawat
- Notes App — localStorage CRUD demo. https://priyanshsinghpurawat.github.io/Notes-APP/
- Exchange Rate App — REST API consumption demo. https://priyanshsinghpurawat.github.io/Exchange-Rate/

## Education
- Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) — Jaipur, India (current)
